feed.title: Subject: Eltoo / LN-Symmetry on Inquisition Signet: BIP 118 + 3-Round State Chain (APO+CTV)

entry.title: Subject: Eltoo / LN-Symmetry on Inquisition Signet: BIP 118 + 3-Round State Chain (APO+CTV)
entry.summary: The email highlights an alternative method for implementing functionality similar to Eltoo in the Lightning Network without requiring soft-forks. Specifically, it mentions the use of OTS-PCs (OTS-based Payment Channels). This method is detailed further in a scholarly article available on Arxiv, which can be accessed through the following [link](https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.04021). This approach might be particularly interesting for those involved in Bitcoin development or interested in advancements within the Lightning Network's infrastructure. The communication serves as a technical suggestion and shares relevant research resources that substantiate the proposed methodology.
